task_description: Implement fuzzy translation memory - extend the existing TM to return similar (not just exact) matches using rapidfuzz, integrate into runner/CLI/GUI with configurable thresholds and auto-accept behavior.

verification.summary: All 219 tests pass (203 original + 16 new). Build succeeds with rapidfuzz dependency. CLI shows all fuzzy flags. Fuzzy search returns expected results. Tests cover: FuzzyMatcher unit tests (8), TM integration (5), runner integration (3) -- all exercise real fuzzy logic and would fail if implementation reverted.
